deleteAccount.title: Tape le Akauni
deleteAccount.description: O le taimi lava e te tapeina ai lau teugatupe, e leai se toe foʻi i tua. O au faʻamatalaga uma, lisi, ma talanoaga o le a aveesea tumau.
deleteAccount.irreversible: E lē mafai ona toe suia lenei gaioiga.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: E te mautinoa e te manaʻo e tape lau teugatupe?
deleteAccount.warning: O faʻamatalaga nei o le a tapeina tumau:
deleteAccount.warningListings: O au lisi uma ma oloa
deleteAccount.warningReviews: Au iloiloga ma mea e te fiafia i ai
deleteAccount.passwordLabel: Ulufale i lau upu faataga e faamaonia ai
deleteAccount.passwordPlaceholder: Lau upu faataga o lo'o iai nei
deleteAccount.reasonLabel: Aiseā ua e alu ese ai? (filifiliga)
deleteAccount.reasonNotSatisfied: E le'i fa'amalieina i le tautua
deleteAccount.feedbackPlaceholder: Ta'u mai pe fa'apefea ona matou fa'aleleia atili...
deleteAccount.success: Ua soloia ma le manuia lau teugatupe.
deleteAccount.error: Ua le manuia le tapeina o le teugatupe. Fa'amolemole siaki lau upu fa'alilolilo ma toe taumafai.

hero.title: Fa'avae Fefa'ataua'iga o Manu Ola
hero.subtitle: O le fa'avae fefa'ataua'iga o manu ola e sili ona fa'atuatuaina. Fa'atau ma fa'atau atu au povi ma mamoe ma le saogalemu.

secure.title: Fa'atauga Saogalemu
secure.description: E saogalemu fefaʻatauaiga uma. Ua faʻamaonia faʻamatalaga a le faʻatau ma le tagata faʻatau.

variety.title: Lautele o Oloa
variety.description: Povi, mamoe, ma isi mea. Maua faigofie le manu o loʻo e sailia.

support.title: Lagolago 24/7
support.description: Matou te i ai pea iinei mo au fesili. O lo'o galue pea la matou laina lagolago tuusa'o.

cta.title: Amata Nei
cta.subtitle: Nofo i lou tulaga i luga o se tulaga e feiloa'i ai le faitau afe o tagata fa'atau ma tagata fa'atau.
cta.button: Lesitala mo le leai o se totogi

footer.copyright: © 2025 Fefaatauaiga o Lafumanu. Taofia aia tatau uma.
footer.privacy: Faiga Faavae mo le Tulaga Faalilolilo
footer.newsletterDescription: Aua ne'i misia ia lisi ma fa'alauiloa aupito lata mai.
footer.tagline: O le fausaga fefaʻatauaʻiga o manu ola e sili ona faʻatuatuaina i Turkey.
footer.appleLoginComingSoon: O le ulufale i totonu ma le Apple o le a vave ona aoga.

faq.title: Fesili e Masani Ona Fesiligia
faq.description: Tali i au fesili e masani ona fesiligia e uiga i la matou fa'avae.
faq.noFaqs: E leai ni fesili ua fa'aopoopoina.

about.title: Faatatau ia tatou
about.subtitle: O le fausaga fefaʻatauaʻiga o manu ola e sili ona faʻatuatuaina i Turkey.

mission.title: O La Matou Misiona
mission.description: I le faʻatekinolosiina o fefaʻatauaʻiga o manu ola, matou te faʻamoemoe e fausia se fesoʻotaʻiga saogalemu, manino, ma lelei i le va o le au gaosi oloa ma tagata faʻatau.

vision.title: O La Matou Va'aiga
vision.description: Ia avea ma paionia i le suiga faatekinolosi i le vaega o faatoaga ma ia avea ma faavae faavaomalo i fefaatauaiga o manu ola.

trust.title: Fa'atuatuaga
trust.description: E taua tele le manino ma le faʻatuatuaina i fefaʻatauaiga uma.

quality.title: Tulaga lelei
quality.description: Fa'aleleia pea lava pea ina ia maua le tautua sili ona lelei.

innovation.title: Fouga
innovation.description: Suiga o le alamanuia e ala i le faʻaaogaina o tekinolosi.

contact.title: Fesootaiga
contact.subtitle: Fa'amolemole fa'afeso'ota'i matou mo ni au fesili.

form.title: Tusi mai ia i matou
form.name: Lou igoa
form.subject: Mataupu
form.subjectPlaceholder: O le autū o lau savali
form.success: Ua maeʻa ona auina atu lau savali. Matou te toe tali atu ia te oe i se taimi vave e mafai ai.
form.error: Sa tupu se fa'aletonu a'o lafoina le savali. Fa'amolemole toe taumafai.

acceptance.title: 1. Taliaina o Tuutuuga
acceptance.content: I le fa'aaogaina o lenei upega tafa'ilagi, ua e malie i tuutuuga o le fa'aaogaina nei. Afai e te lē malie i nei tuutuuga, fa'amolemole aua le fa'aaogaina le upega tafa'ilagi.

services.title: 2. Auaunaga
services.content: O le Livestock Trading e tuʻuina atu se faʻavae mo le faʻatau ma le faʻatau atu o manu ola. O fefaʻatauaʻiga uma i luga o le faʻavae o le matafaioi lea a le tagata faʻaoga.

accounts.title: 3. Teugatupe a Tagata Faʻaoga
accounts.content: E tatau ona e tuʻuina atu faʻamatalaga saʻo ma lata mai e fatu ai se teugatupe. O lau matafaioi le saogalemu o lau teugatupe.

prohibited.title: 4. Gaoioiga Fa'asāina
prohibited.content: E matuā fa'asā lava fa'asalalauga fa'asesē, fa'amatalaga sese, faiga taufa'asesē, ma gaoioiga fa'asolitulafono.

liability.title: 5. Tapula'a o Noataga
liability.content: E lē nafa tuusa'o le fa'avae mo fefa'ataua'iga i le va o tagata fa'aoga. O fefa'ataua'iga uma e faia i le va o vaega e lua.

changes.title: 6. Suiga
changes.content: E mafai ona suia nei tuutuuga ma aiaiga e aunoa ma se faasilasilaga. O le a amata faamamaluina suiga i le taimi lava e lomia ai.

privacy.title: Faiga Faavae mo le Tulaga Faalilolilo

collection.title: 1. Aoina o Faʻamatalaga
collection.content: A e faia se teugatupe, matou te aoina faʻamatalaga patino e pei o lou igoa, tuatusi imeli, ma le numera telefoni. Atonu foi matou te aoina faʻamatalaga e le o iloa ai oe e uiga i lau faʻaaogaina o le 'upega tafaʻilagi.

usage.title: 2. Faaaogāina o Faamatalaga
usage.content: O faʻamatalaga matou te aoina e faʻaaogaina e tuʻuina atu ai a matou tautua, pulea lau teugatupe, faʻamautinoa le saogalemu, ma ofoina atu ia te oe ni ofo faʻapitoa.

sharing.title: 3. Fefaasoaa'i o Fa'amatalaga
sharing.content: O au faʻamatalaga patino o le a lē faʻatau atu pe lisiina atu i isi vaega. O au faʻamatalaga o le a lē faʻasoa atu vagana ai mo faʻamoemoega faʻaletulafono.

security.title: 4. Puipuiga
security.content: O loʻo faʻatulagaina faiga faʻavae tau puipuiga e puipuia ai au faʻamatalaga.

cookies.title: 5. Kuki
cookies.content: E fa'aaogā e la matou 'upega tafa'ilagi kuki e fa'aleleia atili ai le poto masani a le tagata fa'aoga. E mafai ona e pulea au mea e te fiafia i ai i kuki i au fa'atulagaga o le browser.

rights.title: 6. Au Aia Tatau
rights.content: I lalo o le Tulafono o le Puipuiga o Faʻamatalaga Patino a Turkey (KVKK), e iai lau aia tatau e maua ai, faasaʻo, ma tape au faʻamatalaga patino.

metadata.title: Fefa'ataua'iga o Manu Fa'aola - Fa'avae Fefa'ataua'iga o Manu Ola
metadata.description: O le fa'avae fefa'ataua'iga o manu ola e sili ona fa'atuatuaina i le lalolagi. Fa'atauga ma le fa'atauina atu o manu e saogalemu ma manino.

about.title: Faatatau ia tatou
about.description: Aoao e uiga i Fefaatauaiga o Manu. O se fausaga faatuatuaina mo fefaatauaiga o manu ola.
about.keywords: about livestock trading, live animal platform, livestock trading company, trusted animal market

contact.title: Fesootaiga
contact.description: Fa'afeso'ota'i matou. Ua sauni le 'au lagolago a tagata fa'atau a le Livestock Trading e fesoasoani atu ia te oe.
contact.keywords: livestock trading contact, animal trading support, customer service

terms.title: Tuutuuga o le Faaaogaina
terms.description: Tuutuuga ma Aiaiga o Fefaatauaiga o Manu Fagafao.
terms.keywords: terms of use, livestock trading rules, platform conditions

privacy.title: Faiga Faavae mo le Tulaga Faalilolilo
privacy.description: Faiga fa'avae mo le le faalauaiteleina o fa'atauga o manu. Aoao pe fa'apefea ona puipuia au fa'amatalaga patino.
privacy.keywords: privacy policy, personal data protection, GDPR, livestock trading privacy

products.title: Oloa
products.description: Su'e lisi o manu ola. Fa'asalalauga fa'atuatuaina mo povi, mamoe, ma isi mea.
products.keywords: live animal listings, cattle for sale, sheep for sale, goats for sale, livestock listings, poultry listings, animal market

sellers.title: Tagata Fa'atau
sellers.description: Saili ni tagata fa'atau manu fa'atuatuaina. Fa'amatalaga ma iloiloga fa'amaonia a tagata fa'atau.
sellers.keywords: animal sellers, trusted sellers, verified seller profiles, live animal sellers

transporters.title: felauaiga
transporters.description: Su'e kamupani felauaiga manu. Felauaiga saogalemu ma fa'apolofesa o manu ola.
transporters.keywords: animal transport, livestock carriers, live animal transportation, animal shipping

search.title: Saili
search.description: Saili i totonu o lisi o manu ola. Faigofie ona su'e i filifiliga fa'amama ma fa'avasega.
search.keywords: animal search, livestock search, find animals, animal filter

faq.title: Fesili e Masani Ona Fesiligia
faq.description: Fesili ma tali e masani ona fesiligia e uiga i fefaʻatauaʻiga o lafumanu.
faq.keywords: FAQ, livestock trading questions, animal trading help

sellerDetail.title: {name} - Talaaga o le Fa'atau
sellerDetail.description: Fa'amatalaga a le fa'atau oloa {name}. Iloiloga, lisi, ma fa'amatalaga fa'afeso'ota'i.

transporterDetail.title: {name} - Fa'amatalaga o le Aveta'avale
transporterDetail.description: Fa'amatalaga o le felauaiga a le {name}. Nofoaga e tautua ai, iloiloga, ma fa'amatalaga fa'afeso'ota'i.

home.title: Live Animal Trading Platform | Trusted Livestock Trading
home.description: The world's most trusted live animal trading platform. Buy and sell cattle, sheep, goats and more safely. Verified sellers, transparent prices.
